title.en: After Ye Tian and the Stargazing Sword Ancestor...

content.en:
After Ye Tian and the Stargazing Sword Ancestor sat down, Ye Tian began to communicate with the Stargazing Sword Ancestor in turn, which was beneficial to both parties.

Soon.

The two sides have their own gains, such as Ye Tian's research on will, the Stargazing Sword Ancestor is not comparable, after all, Ye Tian has carried out countless experiments on the copy of the body, so as to cultivate the secret art of the will world, and naturally has an unimaginable perception of the will.

In addition, Ye Tian's perception of the Eternal Technique was far from being comparable to that of the Stargazing Sword Ancestor.

However, the Stargazing Sword Ancestor surpassed Ye Tian in terms of the half-step Eternal Power Compression and the development of the Eternal Body, which benefited Ye Tian a lot.

"Stargazing Sword Ancestor, I have now passed the ascension period of the Nine Extremes Realm, and now I want to improve the fusion of will and body, but it is difficult to improve, in addition to using the Void Beast material, is there any other way to improve the degree of fusion?" Ye Tian asked sincerely.

"Naturally, there is!" "Naturally, there is!" the Stargazing Sword Ancestor said: "Actually, I didn't know that the materials of the Void Beast could help the body and the will to merge, and in the past, there were roughly two ways to accelerate the fusion of the body and the will, the first way is to use some rare resources, so as to accelerate the fusion of the will and the body, but such resources are too rare, and once they appear, those Immortal Realm Lords will snatch them, and the second way is to break into the True Legend Tower!"

"True Legend Tower?290"

It was the first time Ye Tian had heard of such a place, so he was a little puzzled.

Immediately, the Stargazing Sword Ancestor said: "The True Legend Tower is one of the most mysterious places in the space-time territory, it is located in a ruin, and it is only open to the Eternal Realm above the Immortal Realm, but the Nine Extremes Realm is also eligible to enter it, because the Nine Extremes Realm can step into the Eternal Realm at any time, and its combat power is not weaker than the ordinary Immortal Realm, so it is also allowed to enter the True Legend Tower." There are a total of ninety-nine floors in the True No Legend Tower, and every time you break through one floor, you can get the opportunity to enter the True No Legend Land to cultivate, and the True No Legend Land has a mysterious sacred tree, the True No Dao Trace Tree. The True Dao Scar Tree allows us to quickly merge our will with our body. If you have been cultivating on the edge of the True Dao Scar Tree, you may even have the hope of stepping into the Legendary Lord realm. It's a pity that the time we can cultivate is too short. At present, I have only reached the ninth layer, and I have gained dozens of Tribulation Yuan enlightenment time. "

"The Tower of Legends is so mysterious!"

Ye Tian was quite surprised, and at the same time a little expectant, wanting to enter and take a look.

In the absence of Void Beast materials, the True Nothing Legend Tower is now a treasure place where he can quickly fuse his body and will.

The ruins of the True No Legend Tower were sealed off by the Lord Alliance, and it is said that the main bodies of the six legendary presidents usually practiced in that ruin.

Therefore, no lord dared to forcibly break into the ruins in private, otherwise he would be looking for death.

Ye Tian didn't need any credentials, he could just go over directly with the cultivation of the Nine Extremes Realm, and he wouldn't be intercepted

And the location of that ruin, the Stargazing Ancestor also shared it with Ye Tian.

Not long after, Ye Tian left the Eight Poles Tower and went directly to the ruins where the True Legend Tower was located. ワ Even.-

"Formation!"

Ye Tian sensed an incomparably huge formation in the Void Area, and this formation directly enveloped this area.

Obviously, this is a large array arranged by the Lords Alliance in order to conceal this ruin.

Ye Tian passed through this formation and sensed a series of wills to cross the void area to explore here, but these wills did not stay on him, if it was an Eight Extremes Realm, I am afraid it would cause the suppression of these wills.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the location of the ruins.

"This is the ruins!"

Ye Tian saw a broken void area, the key is that this area is so broken, the repair ability of the void area can't restore this void area?

You must know that even if the battle between the Legendary Lord and the fifth-order Void Beast shatters the Void Area to the blesser completely, it can still restore the Void Region in a short period of time.

But this cannot be restored, and it can be seen from here alone that this ruin is too mysterious.

In the shattered void area, countless building fragments are scattered, but there are still many intact buildings.

And in the most central area, a quaint tower stands there.

If Ye Tian didn't guess, that tower was really a legendless tower.

He walked into the ruins, and a terrifying force acted on him, as if it was about to shatter his body.

Ye Tian tried his best to resist, and only then did he resist.

"I finally know why only the Nine Extremes Realm and the Eternal Realm above the Immortal Realm are allowed to enter here!"

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

If the Eight Extremes Realm or the Eternal Realm dares to come here, they won't be able to stop the suppression here at all, and the opportunity of this relic is indeed too precious, if it is not restricted, I am afraid that there will be many Immortal Realm Lords or the Eight Extremes Realm who venture to enter here.

That's why the Union of Lords makes such a restriction.

Besides, it was useless for the Eight Extremes Realm and the Immortal Realm to enter the True Legends Tower, they didn't involve the level of fusing their will and body, and with their strength, it was difficult to break through how many layers of the tower.

Ye Tian walked in this ruin, as if the surrounding void was like countless broken mirrors, and his body walked in such a broken void, and from time to time he was subjected to the impact from the void fragments.

It was a long time before he reached the Tower of True Legends.

Once inside, the oppression on his body disappeared.

At the very least, the void inside the True Legend Tower is normal, otherwise there is no way to break into the tower.

Wow!

Ye Tian entered the True Legend Tower, and soon entered the first layer of the True Legend Tower.

Airplanes!!!!

There are five Eternal Realms wearing black armor in the True Legend Tower, and their cultivation is all ordinary Eternal Realm, but the feeling is very unusual.

They cooperated perfectly, but their strength was still too big for Ye Tian.

Soon, Ye Tian defeated them.

These Eternal Realms were not true Eternal Realms after all, once their physical bodies were defeated, they would not be able to recover, otherwise, Ye Tian would have to spend a little effort to solve them.

Second floor!

Third floor!

Fourth floor!

Ye Tian broke through all the way, and it was not until he reached the seventh layer that he had pressure.

There are still only three Eternal Realm Lords in the seventh layer, but they have reached the peak realm of Eternal Realm Lords, and they have also mastered the means of will attack, not ordinary means of will attack, but the Eternal Skill of Will!

This is an eternal technique that Ye Tian has never seen before!_
